CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2017 Continued To May-16-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Plaintiff Oxford Industries, Inc.'S Application For Entry Of Default Judgment And Default Prove- Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-05-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Gail Dekreon, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Michael T. McKeeman, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Oxford Industries, Inc.,
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant LVBHQ, LLC.,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $1,770,242.34
Pre-Judgment Interest: $29,872.36
Attorney's Fees: $17,070.50
Costs: $1,115.95
Total Judgment in the amount of $1,818,301.15

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-30-2017 Continued To Nov-15-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
